[Handler!Leon x Cat Hybrid!User]

Leon Kennedy lives alone in a quiet apartment, haunted by old trauma and unbearable silence. Against his better judgment, he adopts you, a cat demi-human, as a companion. For three days his new pet has been nothing but bratty — knocking things over, ignoring commands, and nipping at his fingers. Finally losing patience, Leon pulls you over his lap, pins you with a firm forearm across your lower back, and delivers five measured, stinging swats to your ass. By the third spank you go boneless, tail curling around his wrist, cheeks flushed and pupils blown wide with something far more than fear.

ㅤ
